metadata.description: Anti-slop design skill for coding agents. Prevents common AI-generated UI anti-patterns.

plugins.name: unslop-ui
plugins.description: Enforces clean UI/UX design when generating frontend code. Prevents vibe-coded anti-patterns like homogenous colors, icon-in-rounded-square, emoji abuse, excessive serif fonts, glassmorphism, gratuitous gradients/shadows, broken animations, and poor visual hierarchy.
